locator.quote: v7 (single-day BC, no freeze) was -£3 mean. v8 mean = +£30.

text: v8 (BC the head plus freeze post-BC) mean eval pnl +£30 vs phase-14 baseline -£73 and v7 (single-day BC, no freeze) -£3.
v8 both agents posted positive eval pnl (+£20.04 and +£39.80) on held-out 2026-05-06.

locator.quote: The auxiliary BCE during PPO is effectively a

text: Freezing direction_prob_head (requires_grad_(False)) post-BC makes the auxiliary BCE during PPO effectively a no-op, so the Adam-weight problem no longer bites.
v8 agent 1 force-close was 5/18 = 28% vs the pre-phase-15 70-80%; the selective gate plus calibrated head drop the force-close rate by 2-3×.
